title: BlockOfPidgeon
description: A mod for Fabric which adds new custom blocks, post-netherite tools and armor which can be found and obtained exclusively in The End Dimension.
body:
**Description:**
- This mod adds brand new items that can only be found and obtained in The End Dimension

**Content:**
- Blocks: Pidgeon Ore, Pidgeon Block
- Weapons: Pidgeon Sword, Pidgeon Pickaxe, Pidgeon Axe, Pidgeon Shovel, Pidgeon Hoe
- Armor: Pidgeon Helmet, Pidgeon Chestplate, Pidgeon Leggings, Pidgeon Boots
- Misc: Eye Of Pidgeon, Pidgeon Template

**Armor Bonus:**
- Slow Falling effect

**Note:**
- Blocks can ONLY be mined with Netherite Pickaxe or up
- Pidgeon Ore can spawn anywhere between Y level 0 and 50
- End City chests have 10% chance of containing Pidgeon Block

**Requirements:**
- Fabric API

**Forge:**
- Compatible using Sinytra Connector
